title: Miracle-Gro Performance Organics All Purpose Granular Plant Food, 1 kg (Bee, Pet & Child Friendly), Grey
features: Good-performance organic granular plant food – grows plants twice as big, organically
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Grows plants twice as big, organically Feed your plants the organic nutrients they need to grow twice as big (vs. unfed plants), naturally! 100% natural and organic Plant based by-products from the food industry, and enriched with guano. Feeds for 3 months Nutrients release slowly over 3 months. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Grows Twice As Big 2 100% Natural & Organic 3 Feeds For 3 Months 4 Pet & Child Friendly High performance organic granular plant food that grows plants twice as big Performance Organics from Miracle-Gro is the breakthrough range of 100% natural gardening products that still grows twice as big, but organically. Perfect for use in hanging baskets, pots and containers, indoor and out - this organic plant food is 100% natural, and will give you visibly healthier plants in just 7 days, and nourish them for up to 3 months. Our plant-based specialist formula is child, pet and bee friendly. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Performance Organics All Purpose Granular Plant Food? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro Performance Organics All Purpose Granular Plant Food? Ideal for all plants, flowers, fruits and vegetables. Perfect for use in hanging baskets, pots and containers indoor and out. When should I use Miracle-Gro Performance Organics All Purpose Granular Plant Food? Use every 4-6 weeks when plants are actively growing. How do I use Miracle-Gro Performance Organics All Purpose Granular Plant Food? Using the guide measure out the recommended dose. Lightly work the granules into the soil around your plant. After application give your plant a good drink. We recommend using the Miracle-Gro Performance Organics composts to get even better results.
